rationale: clone_end_point spec ensures cloned_ep@ == ep@ (Seq-level equality on id), but det_clone_end_point_equal(r1,r2) is r1.id == r2.id (Vec equality). In Verus, Vec<T> has uninterpreted View, and there is no axiom or ext_equal that lifts Seq-view equality to Vec equality. Verified locally that even `requires a@==b@ ensures a==b` for Vec<u8> fails. With opaque_ok=False the equivalence check is fundamentally not provable from the given clone_end_point spec, so giving up.
